# mostafa-effati-book â€” LLM context

> Personal markdown library at https://book.mostafaeffati.com
> Author: Mostafa Effati

## Stack

- Next.js 16 App Router, React 19, TypeScript
- Tailwind v4, shadcn/ui (base-nova)
- Content: gray-matter + markdown files in `content/`
- Client: TanStack Query, Zustand (locale, sidebar, last-read)
- Diagrams: mermaid (dynamic import)
- i18n: URL-based â€” EN at `/`, FA at `/fa/`

## Key paths

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `content/books/{slug}/book.json` | Book metadata (localized title/description) |
| `content/books/{slug}/chapters/*.md` | Flat book chapters |
| `content/books/{slug}/parts/{part}/*.md` | Part chapters |
| `*.fa.md` | Persian body overlay (same slug as `.md`) |
| `content/ads.json` | Ad placements and creatives |
| `content/site.json` | Site title/description (en/fa) |
| `lib/content/get-content.ts` | All content loaders (accept `locale`) |
| `lib/i18n/messages.ts` | UI strings en/fa |
| `lib/i18n/routing.ts` | `/fa` prefix helpers |
| `lib/ads/get-ads.ts` | Resolve ads for page/marker |
| `components/pages/*-page-view.tsx` | Shared page renderers |
| `app/fa/**` | Persian routes (mirror of English) |

## URL rules

- English: `/`, `/books/{book}`, `/books/{book}/{chapter}`
- Persian: `/fa`, `/fa/books/{book}`, `/fa/books/{book}/{chapter}`
- Locale toggle navigates between mirrored URLs
- FA chapter without `.fa.md` â†’ translation fallback (no English body on FA URL)

## Content conventions

- Frontmatter `title`/`description`: string OR `{ en, fa }`
- Persian translation file: `{slug}.fa.md` next to `{slug}.md`
- In-content ad marker: `<!-- ad:MARKER_ID -->` matching `content/ads.json`
- Images: `/images/...` in `public/`
- Mermaid: fenced code block `mermaid`

## Fonts

- EN body: Geist; EN headings: Instrument Serif
- FA body: Vazirmatn; FA headings: Gulzar (`--font-heading-fa`)

## SEO

- `app/sitemap.ts`, `app/robots.ts`
- `lib/seo/metadata.ts` â€” canonical + hreflang per page
- JSON-LD: WebSite, Book, Article, BreadcrumbList
- See `I18N-AND-SEO.md` for bilingual strategy

## Docs for humans

- `CONTENT.md` â€” how to add books/chapters/translations
- `ADS.md` â€” ad configuration
- `I18N-AND-SEO.md` â€” locale/SEO decisions

## Commands

```bash
pnpm dev
pnpm build
```

## Sample FA content

- `content/books/mostafa-effati/parts/engineering/introduction.fa.md`

## When editing

- Pass `locale` to `getBookBySlug`, `getChapter`, `getAllBooks`
- Client links: use `useLocalizedPaths()` not raw `bookPath()`
- Wrap chapter body with `ContentWithAds` when ads needed
- Do not show English markdown on `/fa/` URLs without translation
